column1: # FrodoKEM (standard, ISO draft — salted) via github.com/Microsoft/PQCrypto-LWEKE.
# Both matrix-A generation methods are benchmarked: AES128 (AES-NI) and SHAKE128.
# Sizes are identical within a level; only the timings differ.
# Columns: file, name, pk, sk, ct, ss, iters, suffix (upstream symbol suffix crypto_kem_*_<suffix>)
